summary: Responsive hardening pass verified end-to-end on aiclonechats.com. Tested 8 routes across 10 viewports (320→1920) for horizontal overflow, heading wrapping, modal scrollability, iOS-zoom prevention, tap-target heights, and Smart Reply generate-flow regression. All 80 viewport/route combinations had ZERO horizontal overflow. All inputs/textareas on mobile (<768px) compute to 16px font-size. Tap-targets all >=44px. ChatInfoModal scrollable on mobile. Smart Reply generate flow produced 3 reply cards with full action buttons.

issues: Text content has no space between sentences: 'Make an AI version of yourself.Let people talk to it.' — period immediately followed by 'L' (likely a JSX whitespace stripping issue between two spans). Cosmetic content bug, not responsive bug. No visual overflow.

action_items: OPTIONAL (cosmetic, not responsive): Add a space between the two sentences in the landing hero h1 — currently renders as 'yourself.Let' without a space. Likely a missing whitespace between two adjacent <span> elements in /app/frontend/src/pages/Landing.jsx.
critical_code_review_comments: Mode/tone button counts diverge from spec: spec said '4 mode + 6 tone' but page exposes 5 mode (data-testid^=sr-mode-) + 7 tone (data-testid^=sr-tone-). Likely an extra 'all'/default option per category. Not blocking; only worth confirming the spec is up to date.
Modal-shell uses h+maxH set inline (613.64px @ 667 vh ≈ 92dvh) and overflow-y:auto — works correctly. Good implementation.
Inputs/textareas correctly enforce 16px font-size on mobile, preventing iOS zoom — confirmed on /smart-reply, /login, /mood-chat at 375px.
All tap targets (.btn-brutal, .btn-violet, .btn-ghost) on landing at 375px measured >=44px height (0 of 7 below threshold).
test_credentials: sr-tester@example.com / TestPass123! (login confirmed working — session_token set in localStorage, redirects to /dashboard)
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing favorites for /smart-reply/favorites which already had 1 saved reply (DATING/WARM tag).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 fully validated the responsive hardening pass. Concrete measurements captured: (a) zero horizontal overflow on 80 viewport×route combos including 320×568 on /, /explore, /mood-chat, /login, /register, /smart-reply, /smart-reply/history, /smart-reply/favorites; (b) hero h1 at 320px: width=288 / scrollWidth=288 (no overflow), wordBreak=normal, overflowWrap=break-word; (c) SmartReplyStudio h1 'Paste it. Get the right reply.' at 320px: width=246/sw=246; (d) all <input>/<textarea> on /smart-reply, /login, /mood-chat at 375px have computedStyle fontSize=16px; (e) ChatInfoModal at 375×667 has overflow-y:auto with maxHeight≈92dvh and a 44×76 close button; (f) Smart Reply generate at 375px produced sr-reply-card-0/1/2 each with sr-copy-btn-N, sr-favorite-btn-N, sr-regenerate-btn-N. Only minor cosmetic issue: landing hero text is missing a space between two adjacent sentence spans ('yourself.Let').
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Single cosmetic whitespace concatenation in landing hero h1 spans (likely two {...} rendered without intervening space in Landing.jsx). Reproduction: visit / at any viewport — observe 'yourself.Let' without space.
